intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC 确立管辖边界，英欧 AI 版权博弈升级
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Limits Jurisdiction; UK-EU AI Copyright Clash Escalates
intel_overview.summary_zh: 欧洲 IP 战场呈现司法确权与行政监管双轨并进态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过判例明确长臂管辖边界及 FRAND 费率裁定权，重塑跨境诉讼规则；英国则聚焦 AI 版权例外与官费上调，政策不确定性增加。德法等国强化专利质量与执法协作，中韩申请量激增引发竞争加剧。整体环境趋向高成本、强合规与技术细节深度审查，企业需精准应对管辖策略与数据合规挑战。
top_signals: UPC 上诉院在 Adobe 案中明确限制对境外被告的长臂管辖权
英国政府启动 AI 训练版权例外咨询并确认 4 月官费上调
曼海姆分院打破传统倾向直接裁定全球 FRAND 许可费率
法韩启动 PPH 试点，中欧韩三地专利审查加速联动
cross_currents: 司法层面 UPC 正从程序探索转向实体规则确立，特别是费率裁定与管辖权界定
立法层面英国试图在 AI 创新激励与版权保护间寻找新平衡，可能偏离欧盟标准
执法层面数字工具（IPEP）与行为心理学被引入，侵权打击精度与维度显著提升
implications: 中国企业在无欧洲实体时可利用管辖权新规抗辩境外侵权指控
出口欧盟需严防 SEP 许可谈判程序瑕疵导致多国禁令风险
涉 AI 业务需重新评估在英国及欧洲的数据训练合规与版权归属策略
watchlist: 2026 年 4 月 1 日英国知识产权局新费率正式实施后的成本影响
UPC 后续关于 FRAND 费率计算方法的详细判决理由
英国最终落地的 AI 版权例外条款及其对跨国企业的追溯力

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC 限缩长臂管辖，法韩 PPH 提速确权
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Limits Long-Arm Jurisdiction; France-Korea PPH Launches
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲 IP 格局迎来关键转折：UPC 上诉院在 Adobe 案中明确限制长臂管辖，利好无境内实体被告；法韩启动 PPH 试点，为中欧韩三地布局提供加速通道。执法层面，英国强化商标未付费用公示与使用举证责任，德国法院维持核心医药专利有效。美司法部反垄断调查波及欧企联合谈判，跨境合规风险显著上升。
key_moves: UPC 上诉院推翻一审扩大解释，确立无境内被告即无长臂管辖原则
法国与韩国正式启动双向专利审查高速路（PPH）试点项目
UKIPO 公布商标争议未付费用清单，强化程序财务纪律
美司法部启动针对欧洲车企专利谈判集团的反垄断调查
business_actions: 利用 UPC 新判例，对无欧盟境内实体的诉讼积极提出管辖权异议
统筹中韩欧申请策略，借道法韩 PPH 低成本加速欧洲专利确权
建立商标真实使用证据链，防范因无法举证而丧失维权资格
watchlist: UPC 后续案件中对‘境内损害’认定的具体边界
西班牙 AI 企业应对中国专利新规的后续动态
欧美数据中心专利池许可模式的费率走向

report_items.title_zh: 决定：商标争议中的未付费用命令清单
report_items.title: Decision: Trade mark disputes: unpaid costs orders
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布了一份关于知识产权双方听证会后产生的未付费用的清单。该文件列出了在商标争议程序中，败诉方未按规定缴纳的费用命令详情。此举旨在提高程序透明度，并作为对未履行财务义务当事人的公开记录，强化了英国商标争议解决机制中的成本执行力度。
core_points_zh: UKIPO 公布商标争议听证后的未付费用清单
清单记录了当事人未履行法院或局方成本命令的情况
此举意在强化商标争议程序中的财务纪律与透明度
report_items.insight_zh: 在英参与商标维权的中国企业需高度重视程序性成本裁决。一旦败诉且未及时缴纳费用，不仅面临强制执行，更会被列入官方公开黑名单，损害商业信誉。建议企业在应对争议时，将潜在成本纳入风险评估，并确保合规履行后续财务义务。
insight_points_zh: 警惕未付费用被列入官方清单带来的声誉风险
在英国商标诉讼中应严格评估并预留程序成本预算

report_items.title_zh: 法国与韩国启动专利审查高速路（PPH）试点项目
report_items.title: Accord PPH avec la Corée du Sud
report_items.summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）宣布与韩国知识产权局（KIPO）建立专利审查高速路（PPH）机制。申请人可基于一方办公室的可专利性审查结果，请求另一方加速处理对应申请，不受申请先后顺序限制。该机制要求权利要求范围相同或更窄，在法申请免费，在韩申请需缴纳约 150 欧元费用，旨在提升跨国专利授权效率。
core_points_zh: 法韩双向加速：任一局审查通过后，另一局可依请求加速处理，无视申请时序
权利要求一致性：加速请求需基于已获肯定的权利要求，且新申请范围不得扩大
成本差异显著：法国局免收加速费，韩国局收取约 20 万韩元（约 150 欧元）官费
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧韩同时布局时，可利用此机制以韩国审查结果加速法国授权，反之亦然。建议优先在审查较快的一方获取积极意见，再向另一方提交 PPH 请求，以缩短欧洲市场保护周期并降低整体时间成本。
insight_points_zh: 利用韩法互补：借韩国较快审查结果，低成本加速法国专利确权进程
优化申请策略：统筹中欧韩三地布局，通过 PPH 机制规避重复审查延误

report_items.title_zh: Mewburn 助 Banham 获专利侵权案即决判决
report_items.title: Mewburn secures Summary Judgment for Banham in the Patents Court
report_items.summary_zh: 英国专利法院在 Banham 诉 Rogers 案中作出即决判决，认定被告复制受保护钥匙构成专利侵权及商标侵权。法院驳回被告“诚实使用”抗辩，明确若商标使用与非法行为交织则非诚实。该案展示了法院在侵权清晰且抗辩无力时，无需全面审理即可快速结案并判予成本的执法倾向。
core_points_zh: 法院认定复制受保钥匙构成专利与商标双重侵权
明确商标使用若伴随非法行为则不适用诚实使用抗辩
专利法院倾向于对无实质抗辩案件适用即决判决程序
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇侵权时，可评估即决判决策略以降低成本和时间。同时需注意，任何试图以“诚实使用”为由的抗辩，若基础行为违法将难以成立，合规经营是维权基石。
insight_points_zh: 利用即决判决机制可高效解决事实清晰的侵权纠纷
违法行为无法通过诚实使用抗辩获得商标法庇护

report_items.title_zh: 他人异议您的商标时该如何应对？
report_items.title: What happens if someone opposes your trade mark? | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 文章解析英国商标申请遭遇异议或收到潜在异议通知（TM7a 表格）的情形。指出 TM7a 仅是第三方意图评估权利的预警，非正式异议启动。该机制可延长公告期，为双方提供商业解决窗口。强调收到通知无需恐慌，专业介入常可避免争端升级。
core_points_zh: TM7a 是潜在异议通知，旨在延长审查期而非启动正式法律对抗
收到通知不代表必然发生争议，多为权利人意在争取评估时间
通过专业建议，多数此类情况可在早期以商业方式快速解决
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在英申请商标时，若遇 TM7a 通知切勿忽视或盲目应诉。应视其为谈判信号，及时聘请当地律师评估风险，利用延长期与对方沟通，争取以共存协议等低成本方式化解潜在冲突，避免程序空转。
insight_points_zh: 视 TM7a 为预警信号，及时寻求专业评估而非被动等待
利用公告延长期主动沟通，争取以商业和解替代昂贵诉讼

report_items.title_zh: 一项反诉一份费：后续单独提交副本需另缴费
report_items.title: One counterclaim, one fee – but not for a later-filed copy
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院曼海姆地方法庭在 Irdeto 诉大疆案中裁定，若多名被告共同提交一份无效反诉，仅需缴纳一份费用；但若被告因送达时间不同而后续单独提交内容相同的反诉，则视为独立程序行为，必须另行缴费。该裁决澄清了程序规则 370.7 的适用边界。
core_points_zh: 多被告联合提交反诉仅需缴纳一份固定及价值基础费用
后续单独提交的反诉即便内容相同，亦被视为独立案件需缴费
未按期补缴费用可能导致法院依据规则 355 作出缺席判决
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，若涉及多国被告或送达时间不一，切勿假设已付费用可覆盖后续动作。务必监控每位被告的程序节点，及时为单独提交的反诉预算并缴纳费用，避免因欠费导致丧失无效抗辩权利。
insight_points_zh: 送达时间差异会导致反诉费用增加，需提前规划预算
单独提交反诉未缴费将面临缺席判决风险，须严格监控

report_items.title_zh: 2025 年欧洲专利局专利申请排名发布
report_items.title: Classement 2025 des demandes de brevets à l’OEB
report_items.summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局发布 2025 年欧专局申请数据。法国以 10932 件申请居欧洲第二、全球第六，交通领域创新领先。法企加速采用单一专利制度，占比达三分之一。美、德申请量微跌，中、韩显著增长，显示全球专利布局竞争加剧。
core_points_zh: 法国稳居欧洲第二大专利申请国，交通领域创新最强
瓦雷奥、赛峰等法企主导申请，单一专利使用率提升
中韩申请量大幅增长，欧美传统强国呈现小幅下滑态势
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲交通与能源技术竞争态势，评估在法布局策略。鉴于法企高频使用单一专利，中方需优化欧专局与单一专利组合申请，以应对日益激烈的区域技术保护竞争。
insight_points_zh: 借鉴法企单一专利策略，优化欧洲专利组合成本效益
聚焦交通与电气领域，防范中韩欧三方技术壁垒升级

report_items.title_zh: 2026 变局：西班牙 AI 创新者须知中国专利令第 84 号修订
report_items.title: The 2026 shift: what spanish AI innovators need to know about China’s revised Patent Decree 84
report_items.summary_zh: 文章基于 CNIPA 数据指出，德法意瑞等国在华专利申请停滞或下滑，而西班牙逆势增长。针对中国修订后的专利令第 84 号，分析其将于 2026 年带来的政策转向，旨在指导西班牙 AI 领域创新者调整在华知识产权布局策略以应对新规。
core_points_zh: 西班牙在华专利申请量逆势增长，与主要欧洲工业国趋势背离
中国专利令第 84 号修订将于 2026 年生效，引发政策环境变化
文章专为西班牙 AI 创新者提供应对中国新专利法规的策略指引
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注西班牙等新兴欧洲力量在华专利动态，预判其利用新规加强保护的意图。建议提前评估竞争态势，优化自身在欧及双向技术转移中的专利防御与许可策略。
insight_points_zh: 警惕西班牙企业借中国新规强化其在华 AI 技术保护壁垒
需动态监控中欧双向专利政策互动，规避潜在侵权与许可风险

report_items.title_zh: 基于消费速率调整内容复杂度被认定为非技术特征
report_items.title: Selective Presentation Of Content Of Varying Complexity: Non-technical
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在 T 1207/22 号案件中裁定，根据用户内容消费速率动态调整展示内容复杂度的方法属于非技术目标。尽管消费速率可客观测量，但该逻辑本身可由非技术人员构想，不具备技术性。不过，案件因涉及临时内容与静态内容处理的技术实现细节被发回重审。
core_points_zh: 依据 Comvik 原则，适配内容复杂度属非技术目的
即使基于客观数据，核心逻辑仍缺乏技术贡献
临时内容处理的技术实现需进一步审查与检索
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请社交算法类专利时，应避免仅强调商业逻辑或用户体验优化。需深入挖掘底层数据处理、缓存机制等具体技术实现细节，以证明存在超越常规编程的技术贡献，规避被驳回风险。
insight_points_zh: 算法专利需聚焦底层技术实现而非业务逻辑
区分临时与静态内容的处理可作为技术突破口

report_items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Adobe 案中明确限制长臂管辖权范围
report_items.title: UPC Weekly - UPC Court of Appeal imposes clear limit on long arm jurisdiction
report_items.summary_zh: UPC 上诉院推翻巴黎地方法院裁决，明确若被告均非 UPC 成员国居民，法院无权管辖非 UPC 领土内的侵权行为。该案澄清了布鲁塞尔条例适用边界：仅当损害发生在 UPC 境内时方可起诉境外被告，且不能延伸至瑞士、英国等非成员国的侵权损害，确立了清晰的管辖红线。
core_points_zh: 无 UPC 境内被告时，法院无权管辖境外发生的专利侵权行为
对境外被告的管辖严格限于 UPC 领土内产生的损害，不可外延
推翻一审扩大解释，明确 BSH 判例不适用于无境内锚点被告情形
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应利用此判例抗辩不当管辖，避免在非 UPC 国家被连带诉讼。同时需重新评估在欧洲的应诉策略，若主要资产或运营不在 UPC 境内，可主张管辖权异议以降低跨境诉讼风险。
insight_points_zh: 若无 UPC 境内实体，可据此判例积极提出管辖权异议抗辩
需区分损害发生地，防止非 UPC 国家侵权行为被强行纳入诉讼

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC 限缩长臂管辖，英欧 AI 版权博弈升温
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Limits Long-Arm Jurisdiction; UK-EU AI Copyright Tensions Rise
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲 IP 格局呈现司法克制与政策观望双重特征。UPC 上诉院明确限制长臂管辖权，确立无境内被告不管辖原则，利好跨境防御；德国法院裁定 AI 生成设计无版权，而英国暂缓 AI 训练例外立法，凸显中欧在 AI 确权上的分歧。此外，法韩 PPH 启动及 UPC 诉讼费用规则细化，要求企业重新评估欧陆专利布局成本与诉讼策略。
key_moves: UPC 上诉院推翻一审扩大解释，明确无境内被告时不行使长臂管辖权
德国法院认定纯 AI 生成设计缺乏人类创意而不受版权保护
英国政府决定暂缓调整 AI 训练版权例外规则，维持现状
法国与韩国正式启动专利审查高速路（PPH）试点项目
business_actions: 利用 UPC 管辖权新判例，对无欧洲实体的境外侵权指控积极提出管辖异议
出口含 AI 设计产品前进行版权风险评估，保留人类深度干预创作的证据链
借法韩 PPH 机制加速欧洲专利确权，统筹中韩欧三地申请以降低成本
watchlist: 英国后续关于 AI 与版权框架的咨询反馈及立法动向
UPC 各分院对临时措施及广泛禁令的具体适用尺度
欧盟数据法案执法案例中商业秘密抗辩的成功率

report_items.title_zh: 决定：商标争议中的未付费用命令清单
report_items.title: Decision: Trade mark disputes: unpaid costs orders
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布了一份关于知识产权双方听证会后产生的未付费用的清单。该文件列出了在商标争议程序中，败诉方未按规定缴纳的费用命令详情。此举旨在提高程序透明度，并作为对未履行财务义务当事人的公开记录，强化了英国商标争议解决机制中的成本执行力度。
core_points_zh: UKIPO 公布商标争议听证后的未付费用清单
清单记录了当事人未履行法院或局方成本命令的情况
此举意在强化商标争议程序中的财务纪律与透明度
report_items.insight_zh: 在英参与商标维权的中国企业需高度重视程序性成本裁决。一旦败诉且未及时缴纳费用，不仅面临强制执行，更会被列入官方公开黑名单，损害商业信誉。建议企业在应对争议时，将潜在成本纳入风险评估，并确保合规履行后续财务义务。
insight_points_zh: 警惕未付费用被列入官方清单带来的声誉风险
在英国商标诉讼中应严格评估并预留程序成本预算

report_items.title_zh: 法国与韩国启动专利审查高速路（PPH）试点项目
report_items.title: Accord PPH avec la Corée du Sud
report_items.summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）宣布与韩国知识产权局（KIPO）建立专利审查高速路（PPH）机制。申请人可基于一方办公室的可专利性审查结果，请求另一方加速处理对应申请，不受申请先后顺序限制。该机制要求权利要求范围相同或更窄，在法申请免费，在韩申请需缴纳约 150 欧元费用，旨在提升跨国专利授权效率。
core_points_zh: 法韩双向加速：任一局审查通过后，另一局可依请求加速处理，无视申请时序
权利要求一致性：加速请求需基于已获肯定的权利要求，且新申请范围不得扩大
成本差异显著：法国局免收加速费，韩国局收取约 20 万韩元（约 150 欧元）官费
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧韩同时布局时，可利用此机制以韩国审查结果加速法国授权，反之亦然。建议优先在审查较快的一方获取积极意见，再向另一方提交 PPH 请求，以缩短欧洲市场保护周期并降低整体时间成本。
insight_points_zh: 利用韩法互补：借韩国较快审查结果，低成本加速法国专利确权进程
优化申请策略：统筹中欧韩三地布局，通过 PPH 机制规避重复审查延误

report_items.title_zh: Mewburn 助 Banham 获专利侵权案即决判决
report_items.title: Mewburn secures Summary Judgment for Banham in the Patents Court
report_items.summary_zh: 英国专利法院在 Banham 诉 Rogers 案中作出即决判决，认定被告复制受保护钥匙构成专利侵权及商标侵权。法院驳回被告“诚实使用”抗辩，明确若商标使用与非法行为交织则非诚实。该案展示了法院在侵权清晰且抗辩无力时，无需全面审理即可快速结案并判予成本的执法倾向。
core_points_zh: 法院认定复制受保钥匙构成专利与商标双重侵权
明确商标使用若伴随非法行为则不适用诚实使用抗辩
专利法院倾向于对无实质抗辩案件适用即决判决程序
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇侵权时，可评估即决判决策略以降低成本和时间。同时需注意，任何试图以“诚实使用”为由的抗辩，若基础行为违法将难以成立，合规经营是维权基石。
insight_points_zh: 利用即决判决机制可高效解决事实清晰的侵权纠纷
违法行为无法通过诚实使用抗辩获得商标法庇护

report_items.title_zh: 他人异议您的商标时该如何应对？
report_items.title: What happens if someone opposes your trade mark? | Potter Clarkson
report_items.summary_zh: 文章解析英国商标申请遭遇异议或收到潜在异议通知（TM7a 表格）的情形。指出 TM7a 仅是第三方意图评估权利的预警，非正式异议启动。该机制可延长公告期，为双方提供商业解决窗口。强调收到通知无需恐慌，专业介入常可避免争端升级。
core_points_zh: TM7a 是潜在异议通知，旨在延长审查期而非启动正式法律对抗
收到通知不代表必然发生争议，多为权利人意在争取评估时间
通过专业建议，多数此类情况可在早期以商业方式快速解决
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在英申请商标时，若遇 TM7a 通知切勿忽视或盲目应诉。应视其为谈判信号，及时聘请当地律师评估风险，利用延长期与对方沟通，争取以共存协议等低成本方式化解潜在冲突，避免程序空转。
insight_points_zh: 视 TM7a 为预警信号，及时寻求专业评估而非被动等待
利用公告延长期主动沟通，争取以商业和解替代昂贵诉讼

report_items.title_zh: 一项反诉一份费：后续单独提交副本需另缴费
report_items.title: One counterclaim, one fee – but not for a later-filed copy
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院曼海姆地方法庭在 Irdeto 诉大疆案中裁定，若多名被告共同提交一份无效反诉，仅需缴纳一份费用；但若被告因送达时间不同而后续单独提交内容相同的反诉，则视为独立程序行为，必须另行缴费。该裁决澄清了程序规则 370.7 的适用边界。
core_points_zh: 多被告联合提交反诉仅需缴纳一份固定及价值基础费用
后续单独提交的反诉即便内容相同，亦被视为独立案件需缴费
未按期补缴费用可能导致法院依据规则 355 作出缺席判决
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，若涉及多国被告或送达时间不一，切勿假设已付费用可覆盖后续动作。务必监控每位被告的程序节点，及时为单独提交的反诉预算并缴纳费用，避免因欠费导致丧失无效抗辩权利。
insight_points_zh: 送达时间差异会导致反诉费用增加，需提前规划预算
单独提交反诉未缴费将面临缺席判决风险，须严格监控

report_items.title_zh: 2025 年欧洲专利局专利申请排名发布
report_items.title: Classement 2025 des demandes de brevets à l’OEB
report_items.summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局发布 2025 年欧专局申请数据。法国以 10932 件申请居欧洲第二、全球第六，交通领域创新领先。法企加速采用单一专利制度，占比达三分之一。美、德申请量微跌，中、韩显著增长，显示全球专利布局竞争加剧。
core_points_zh: 法国稳居欧洲第二大专利申请国，交通领域创新最强
瓦雷奥、赛峰等法企主导申请，单一专利使用率提升
中韩申请量大幅增长，欧美传统强国呈现小幅下滑态势
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲交通与能源技术竞争态势，评估在法布局策略。鉴于法企高频使用单一专利，中方需优化欧专局与单一专利组合申请，以应对日益激烈的区域技术保护竞争。
insight_points_zh: 借鉴法企单一专利策略，优化欧洲专利组合成本效益
聚焦交通与电气领域，防范中韩欧三方技术壁垒升级

report_items.title_zh: 专利授权后的修改申请指南
report_items.title: Requests to amend a patent after grant
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布关于专利授权后修改说明书的官方指南。内容涵盖依据《1977 年专利法》第 27 条向局方提出修改，以及第 75 条在法院诉讼期间提出修改的申请流程。该文件明确了不同路径下的受理标准与审查实践，旨在指导权利人及代理人规范操作，确保修改请求符合法定形式与实质要求，以维持专利有效性或应对无效挑战。
core_points_zh: 明确区分向 UKIPO 提出申请与在法院诉讼中申请修改的不同法律依据
详述专利授权后修改说明书的具体流程、所需文件及审查标准
强调修改不得扩大保护范围，需符合新颖性与创造性等实质要件
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在英持有专利时，若遇无效风险或需澄清权利要求，应善用此机制。建议提前评估修改策略，避免因程序瑕疵导致权利丧失，同时注意法院与局方程序差异，选择最优维权或确权路径。
insight_points_zh: 利用授权后修改机制主动优化权利要求，提升专利稳定性以应对潜在无效挑战
严格区分行政与司法修改路径，根据诉讼状态选择合适机构提交申请以防驳回

report_items.title_zh: 2026 变局：西班牙 AI 创新者须知中国专利令第 84 号修订
report_items.title: The 2026 shift: what spanish AI innovators need to know about China’s revised Patent Decree 84
report_items.summary_zh: 文章基于 CNIPA 数据指出，德法意瑞等国在华专利申请停滞或下滑，而西班牙逆势增长。针对中国修订后的专利令第 84 号，分析其将于 2026 年带来的政策转向，旨在指导西班牙 AI 领域创新者调整在华知识产权布局策略以应对新规。
core_points_zh: 西班牙在华专利申请量逆势增长，与主要欧洲工业国趋势背离
中国专利令第 84 号修订将于 2026 年生效，引发政策环境变化
文章专为西班牙 AI 创新者提供应对中国新专利法规的策略指引
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业应关注西班牙等新兴欧洲力量在华专利动态，预判其利用新规加强保护的意图。建议提前评估竞争态势，优化自身在欧及双向技术转移中的专利防御与许可策略。
insight_points_zh: 警惕西班牙企业借中国新规强化其在华 AI 技术保护壁垒
需动态监控中欧双向专利政策互动，规避潜在侵权与许可风险

report_items.title_zh: 基于消费速率调整内容复杂度被认定为非技术特征
report_items.title: Selective Presentation Of Content Of Varying Complexity: Non-technical
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在 T 1207/22 号案件中裁定，根据用户内容消费速率动态调整展示内容复杂度的方法属于非技术目标。尽管消费速率可客观测量，但该逻辑本身可由非技术人员构想，不具备技术性。不过，案件因涉及临时内容与静态内容处理的技术实现细节被发回重审。
core_points_zh: 依据 Comvik 原则，适配内容复杂度属非技术目的
即使基于客观数据，核心逻辑仍缺乏技术贡献
临时内容处理的技术实现需进一步审查与检索
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请社交算法类专利时，应避免仅强调商业逻辑或用户体验优化。需深入挖掘底层数据处理、缓存机制等具体技术实现细节，以证明存在超越常规编程的技术贡献，规避被驳回风险。
insight_points_zh: 算法专利需聚焦底层技术实现而非业务逻辑
区分临时与静态内容的处理可作为技术突破口

topics.headline_zh: UPC 产能扩容与 SEP 裁决深化
topics.headline_en: UPC Capacity Expansion and SEP Rulings Deepen
topics.summary_zh: 2026 年初 UPC 通过增设审判庭与新法官任命大幅提升诉讼产能，德国分院活跃度显著。法院在 FRAND 费率裁定及管辖权边界上确立新判例，同时 EPO 引入 AI 加速审查。中企面临诉讼节奏加快与合规门槛提升的双重挑战，需紧急调整欧洲维权与应诉策略。
key_points: UPC 杜塞尔多夫增设第二审判庭且多国新法官就职，诉讼审理效率显著提升。
曼海姆分院打破惯例主动裁定 FRAND 费率，确立物联网等新领域执法先例。
上诉院限制长臂管辖权并强调保密令程序，明确司法边界与合规红线。
actions: 针对高价值专利立即评估 UPC 统一诉讼可行性，利用新审判庭资源提速维权。
出口前强化 FRAND 谈判流程合规性审查，完善证据链以应对费率裁决风险。
涉欧诉讼启动时同步申请保密令，严防因程序疏忽导致商业秘密泄露。
watchlist: 威尼斯法官临时会议动向及其对裁判标准隐性调整的影响。
美国将 UPC 列入专利观察名单的地缘政治风险及政策博弈。
EPO 人工智能辅助审查全面推广后的授权周期与质量变化。

topics.headline_zh: UPC 长臂管辖与 FRAND 费率博弈升级
topics.headline_en: UPC Long-Arm Jurisdiction and FRAND Rate Wars Escalate
topics.summary_zh: 欧洲 SEP 诉讼进入深水区，UPC 上诉院通过戴森案首次向欧盟法院提请长臂管辖裁决，界定非欧盟被告责任边界。同时，德国与 UPC 曼海姆分院积极介入全球 FRAND 费率裁定，打破传统惯例。许可意愿认定标准趋严，单纯担保已不足以免除禁令风险，数据合规与谈判留痕成为生存关键。
key_points: UPC 上诉院就非欧盟实体长臂管辖权首次提请 CJEU 裁决，明确境内损害与行政代表责任界限。
德国慕尼黑法院及 UPC 曼海姆分院打破不裁定费率传统，主动确立全球 FRAND 许可条件。
司法实践重构‘许可意愿’标准，强调双向合规评估，单一银行担保不再构成绝对抗辩理由。
actions: 立即审查欧盟授权代表协议，隔离产品安全义务与知识产权侵权责任，防范连带被诉。
建立全周期谈判留痕机制，准备高质量可比协议数据，以应对法院对费率的双向严格审查。
利用 EPO 异议程序作为战术工具，在 UPC 或德国诉讼中申请中止审理，争取谈判筹码。
watchlist: 欧盟法院关于 UPC 长臂管辖权的初步裁决结果及其对非欧盟制造企业的最终界定。
德国联邦最高法院在 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案中对‘非自愿被许可人’认定的终审风向。
Avanci 等专利池向 Wi-Fi 7 及物联网领域扩张引发的新一轮集体许可与反垄断调查。

sep_ai_analysis.summary_zh: SEP 长窗从 2025.01 累计到现在，共识别 120 条高相关信号。近120天里，许可动作占比最高，欧洲层面仍是最活跃场域。
sep_ai_analysis.summary_en: The SEP long window now spans from Jan 2025 to the present with 120 high-relevance signals. In the recent 120-day window, Licensing lead the mix and Europe-wide remains the busiest forum.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 近120天 许可动作 29 / 前120天 8 / 长窗累计 79

insight_cards.insight_zh: 欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的场域，德国紧随其后，争议正在形成多法域联动。
insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with Germany close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。
insight_cards.action_en: Track procedural and decisional shifts in Europe-wide first, then watch for spillover into other venues.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 欧洲层面 30 条；德国 7 条

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 16 条，占近期样本 32%。重点企业包括 Oppo / ZTE / Huawei。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 16 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 32% of the sample. Focus companies include Oppo / ZTE / Huawei.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 100% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。
insight_cards.insight_en: About 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis; summary-only items are mainly useful for directional trend support.
insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。
insight_cards.action_en: For business-critical signals, step back to the source text or public preview before escalating them into priority warnings.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 全文 37 / 预览 83 / 摘要 0

trend_judgments: 近120天 SEP标准必要专利信号较前120天增加 41 条，整体仍在升温。
当前最强主线仍是许可动作，近120天共 29 条，说明专利池、费率与双边谈判继续主导节奏。
欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的主导法域/场域，共出现 30 条相关信号。
中企相关信号近120天共有 16 条，占近期样本 32%；当前专题中约 100% 的样本基于全文或公开预览分析。
trend_judgments_en: SEP signals are up by 41 over the prior 120 days, pointing to a still-heating window.
Licensing remains the strongest line with 29 recent signals, keeping pools, rates, and bilateral talks at the center.
Europe-wide is the most active forum in the recent 120-day window with 30 signals.
China-related signals account for 16 items, or 32% of the recent window; about 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis.

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟执法升级与确权新策
topics.headline_en: EU Enforcement Surge and New Registration Tactics
topics.summary_zh: 本期 EUIPO 动态显示欧盟正全面升级知识产权执法，重点打击假药及有组织犯罪，并推广数字工具。司法层面明确功能性形状不可注册商标，但认可“单点实体 + 线上”模式构成真实使用。此外，手工艺地理标志新体系落地，中小企业可利用公益法律支持降低维权成本。
key_points: EUIPO 联合 Europol 等机构升级全欧打假行动，重点针对假药及有组织犯罪网络。
司法判例确立纯功能性形状无法注册商标，但单一地点服务结合线上可证成真实使用。
手工艺地理标志新体系正式运行，EUIPO 扩大 SMEs 公益法律支持项目覆盖范围。
actions: 排查出口产品是否涉及纯功能性形状设计，避免盲目申请商标导致驳回。
利用“线下单点 + 线上销售”模式积累证据，以低成本维持欧盟商标有效性。
评估中国传统手工艺品申请欧盟地理标志保护的可行性，提前布局国家初审。
watchlist: IPEP 数字执法工具在欧盟海关的实操扣货效率变化。
手工艺地理标志双阶段审查程序中出现的异议案例趋势。
欧盟针对有组织犯罪知识产权案件的刑事判决力度。

topics.headline_zh: 欧英升级打假执法，中企需防刑事风险
topics.headline_en: EU and UK escalate anti-counterfeit enforcement
topics.summary_zh: 2026 年初，欧盟与英国显著升级知识产权刑事执法。EUIPO 联合 Europol 打击有组织犯罪及假药，UKIPO 延长专项组资金至 2029 年并强化公私协作。执法重点转向供应链合规与 AI 数据版权。在欧中企面临更高刑事追责风险，亟需建立预警机制并主动利用新协作渠道维权。
key_points: 欧盟强化跨机构协作，EUIPO 联手 Europol 重点打击有组织犯罪与假药流通
英国确认资助 IP 犯罪专项组至 2029 年，启动公私合作试点提升执法效率
版权执法延伸至 AI 领域，严控训练数据来源成为出版商诉讼新焦点
actions: 立即排查供应链侵权隐患，建立针对有组织犯罪关联的合规防火墙
利用英国新设公私协作试点机制，主动对接执法部门进行品牌保护
审查 AI 研发数据源合法性，规避使用未授权影子图书馆资源引发的诉讼
watchlist: 欧盟 EMPACT 网络会议后续落地的具体跨国执法行动案例
英国 IP 犯罪专项组新试点机制的具体申请流程与准入标准
五大出版商诉影子图书馆案对 AI 训练数据合规的判决风向
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护

brief.headline_zh: UPC 产能扩容与 SEP 裁决深化
brief.headline_en: UPC Capacity Expansion and SEP Rulings Deepen
brief.summary_zh: 2026 年初 UPC 通过增设审判庭与新法官任命大幅提升诉讼产能，德国分院活跃度显著。法院在 FRAND 费率裁定及管辖权边界上确立新判例，同时 EPO 引入 AI 加速审查。中企面临诉讼节奏加快与合规门槛提升的双重挑战，需紧急调整欧洲维权与应诉策略。
key_points: UPC 杜塞尔多夫增设第二审判庭且多国新法官就职，诉讼审理效率显著提升。
曼海姆分院打破惯例主动裁定 FRAND 费率，确立物联网等新领域执法先例。
上诉院限制长臂管辖权并强调保密令程序，明确司法边界与合规红线。
actions: 针对高价值专利立即评估 UPC 统一诉讼可行性，利用新审判庭资源提速维权。
出口前强化 FRAND 谈判流程合规性审查，完善证据链以应对费率裁决风险。
涉欧诉讼启动时同步申请保密令，严防因程序疏忽导致商业秘密泄露。
watchlist: 威尼斯法官临时会议动向及其对裁判标准隐性调整的影响。
美国将 UPC 列入专利观察名单的地缘政治风险及政策博弈。
EPO 人工智能辅助审查全面推广后的授权周期与质量变化。

items.title: AI-assisted minute-taking extended to Unitary Patent oral proceedings
items.title_zh: EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录扩展至统一专利口头程序
items.summary: EPO extends AI‑assisted minute‑taking to Unitary Patent proceedings, improving efficiency, accuracy and consistency while ensuring full human oversight and data protection
items.content: Following a successful pilot phase, the EPO is extending the use of AI to support minute-taking in oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division (UPPD). Following the positive results of the 2025 pilot, the European Patent Office (EPO) is extending AI-assisted minute-taking to oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division. The approach is already used in oral proceedings in examination, opposition, before the Receiving Section and the Legal Division. This step further integrates AI-supported tools into the patent-granting process, while maintaining full human oversight and responsibility for the final minutes. How AI supports the work of divisions Audio is recorded via the videoconferencing system, and a transcript is generated using an AI tool. Shortly after the oral proceedings, the transcript is processed by the division with the support of another AI tool to produce draft minutes. After review, the minutes are finalised by the division in accordance with Rule 124(3) EPC. In line with data protection and procedural safeguards, the recording and its transcription are deleted once the minutes are issued to the parties. Lessons from the 2025 pilot The pilot helped refine and accelerate transcript generation. Examination and opposition divisions reported improvements in the consistency, structure and language of minutes, which were also welcomed by parties to the proceedings. Further information
items.ai_summary_zh: 继 2025 年试点成功后，欧洲专利局（EPO）正式将 AI 辅助笔录技术应用范围扩大至统一专利保护部门（UPPD）的口头程序。该流程利用 AI 生成录音转录稿并起草会议纪要，全程保留人工最终审核权以确保准确性。此举旨在提升审查、异议及统一专利程序的效率与一致性，同时严格遵守数据保护规定，录音在纪要发布后即被删除。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 将 AI 辅助笔录从审查异议程序扩展至统一专利口头程序", "采用", "AI 转录 + 人工复核”模式，确保最终纪要责任归属明确", "严格遵循数据保护原则，程序录音及转录稿在纪要发出后销毁"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧参与统一专利诉讼或异议时，需适应 AI 辅助的高效程序节奏。建议提前准备高质量口头陈述，利用程序一致性优势，同时关注数据隐私合规，确保在人工复核环节有效传达核心技术与法律观点。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["适应 AI 提速后的程序节奏，提升口头审理陈述的精准度", "利用程序一致性红利，强化在人工复核阶段的关键论点输出"]

items.title: European Patent Office meets with German Association for Intellectual Property Law
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局与德国知识产权法协会举行双边会晤
items.summary: EPO-GRUR bilateral meeting on 2 March 2026: Recent developments, quality, unitary patent system and the Observatory were among topics discussed.
items.content: Video interview with President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel On 2 March, the EPO welcomed a delegation from the German Association for Intellectual Property Law (GRUR) to its headquarters in Munich for a bilateral exchange on key developments in the European Patent System. The Vice-President for Legal and International Affairs Christoph Ernst headed the EPO delegation, welcoming GRUR representatives led by their new President, Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel. In line with the EPO’s commitment to structured, inclusive engagement with users, the meeting formed part of the ongoing dialogue with national and international user associations in 2026. The exchange provided an excellent opportunity to reaffirm shared priorities, take stock of the very positive results already achieved, and explore potential for continued co-operation. Quality and operational developments The EPO shared with GRUR recent insights from the Quality Action Plan 2026, published last month, highlighting the importance of user feedback in shaping its priorities. As in previous editions, the plan focuses on targeted technical training and reskilling for EPO examiners, the use of AI-powered tools to advance digital transformation, and maintaining high standards across search, examination and opposition proceedings. The GRUR delegation expressly commended the excellent quality of the EPO‘s products and services, acknowledging the high level of professionalism and reliability throughout the patent granting process. In this context, GRUR confirmed that substantial and measurable progress has been achieved, building on the direction set by the EPO’s Strategic Plans 2023 and 2028, and further consolidating the Office’s reputation for quality. Unitary Patent and strategic foresight Recent developments relating to the Unitary Patent (UP) and the Unified Patent Court (UPC) were also discussed. GRUR acknowledged the success of the UP system to date as reflected in the EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012). Echoing the conclusions from the Draghi and Letta reports, the delegates agreed that the UP and the UPC are essential tools for deepening the Single Market and boosting the EU’s technological sovereignty. Against this backdrop, both sides shared the ambition to build on this strong success, further enhancing the attractiveness and legal certainty offered by the Unitary Patent system. The exchange then turned to the work of the EPO’s Observatory on Patents and Technology, with particular attention to the strategic foresight initiative "Scenarios for the Future 2025-2045". GRUR is among the user organisations invited to contribute to the broad consultation process with key stakeholders, which examines how the innovation landscape and the patent system may develop over the next two decades, which technologies could shape this period, and what role the patent system and patent offices will play in the future. While outcomes of the foresight project are expected in June 2027, the EPO and GRUR expressed a shared interest in continuing close co-operation in various fields both in the short and longer term. ​​GRUR President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel and EPO Vice-President Christoph Ernst with their respective delegations​ About GRUR Founded in 1891, GRUR is Germany’s oldest and largest intellectual property law association and enjoys an outstanding reputation and high level of recognition among IP stakeholders across Europe and beyond. With around 5 000 members in Germany and abroad. Its purpose is the academic advancement and development of IP law at the German, European and international level. Its vast network is composed of a variety of members including patent attorneys and lawyers, judges and academics, as well as companies, business associations and their employees and representatives. A dedicated GRUR standing committee on patent and utility model law, in which the EPO holds observer status, complements the various bilateral interactions with the association. In a video interview with the EPO, GRUR President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel shares further insights into the association’s mission and its vision for the future of the patent system. Further information 附件文档： - EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012) | https://link.epo.org/web/news-events/news/operation-unitary-patent-system.pdf 附件摘录：EPO’s contribution to the European Commission report on the operation of the Unitary patent system (Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012) Operation of the Unitary Patent system Contribution by the European Patent Office to the European Commission report on the operation of Regulation (EU) No 1257/2012 November 2025 epo.org Table of Contents Executive Summary 3 1. Introduction 5 2. Key findings 6 3. Objectives of the creation of the Unitary Patent system 9 3.1 General 9 3.2 Adoption of the Unitary Patent package 11 4. Smooth integration and successful start of the new system 12 4.1 Operations 12 4.2 Fee related aspects 17 4.3 Importance and value of the Unitary Patent system for EU companies in the home market 18 5. Successful legal, technical, financial and operational implementation and strong awareness raising 20 5.1 Governance 20 5.2 Legal Implementation 21 5.3 Technical implementation 25 5.4 Financial implementation 25 5.5 Communication-related implementation and awareness raising 26 5.6 Capacity-building 27 5.7 Interactions between the UPC and the EPO 28 6. Next steps and outlook 28 7. Conclusions 29 Annex 1 31 2 Executive Summary The Unitary Patent system has transformed the landscape for Europe's innovators. In just over two years, it has delivered on its promise to simplify, streamline, and reduce the cost of patent protection and dispute settlement across Europe. The system has become a game-changer, offering businesses a one-stop shop to realise the full potential of the EU’s Single Market. With Unitary Patents, innovators can now obtain patent protection in 18 EU Member States, representing a market of over 317 million inhabitants, and benefit from simpler procedures, a single and competitive set of renewal fees and one comprehensive register. The uptake of the Unitary Patent has exceeded expectations. It is used extensively across all industrial sectors, with almost a third of European patents being now converted into Unitary Patents. Uptake rates are even higher among EU-based proprietors of European patents, at 40%. These proprietors account for over 60% of all requests. This proves the system’s attractiveness to European innovators, dispelling concerns voiced prior to its introduction that overseas users would dominate the Unitary Patent system. Furthermore, nearly 40% of all European patent holders who have requested unitary effect for their granted patents are small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and public research organisations, proving those wrong who believed that the Unitary Patent would appeal only to big business. Amongst European SMEs, there is a higher-than-average uptake rate of 66%. A similarly high uptake rate of 51% is seen among European universities and public research organisations. This figure is all the more remarkable considering that European patent applications from European SMEs and individual inventors make up 22% of the total, and 7% of the total originate from universities and public research organisations. This underscores the system's accessibility and appeal, particularly for European innovators and European SMEs. In addition, the streamlined translation regime of the Unitary Patent reflects the realities of modern technology and advances in machine translation tools. This makes technical information contained in Unitary Patents widely accessible to the public and businesses across Europe. Cooperation between the European Patent Office (EPO), participating EU Member States and the European Commission has been exemplary. This has ensured stable governance and effective administration by the EPO, a fact that was recognised by over 8 000 users in the latest independent User Satisfaction Survey. The EPO has managed the Unitary Patent related tasks within the timeliness expectations, and transparently distributed information and knowledge, for example by making all statistical data publicly available on the Unitary Patent Dashboard. The robust and adaptable institutional framework established through the Select Committee, including the adoption and subsequent amendments of the Rules relating to Unitary Patent Protection, has also proven its worth. Meanwhile, the Unified Patent Court has established itself as a fast and effective centralised forum for resolving disputes across Europe. This has enhanced legal certainty and consistency, while reducing the need for parallel proceedings. The UPC boasts Europe’s most specialised patent judges, sophisticated procedures, and advanced IT infrastructure, including a new Case Management System developed by the UPC with support from the EPO. Its steadily expanding body of balanced and high-quality case law continues to strengthen confidence in the system. The Court’s fees are comparable and competitive with those of national courts and, in view of its multinational 3 jurisdiction, cannot be regarded as disproportionately high. In addition, the UPC’s 40% fee reduction for SMEs ensures that litigation remains fully accessible to smaller entities. In summary, the Unitary Patent and the Unified Patent Court have quickly proven their worth, and the EU institutions were correct to entrust the EPO with the tasks relating to the Unitary Patent. Its implementation has proven to be effective, legally secure, of a high quality, and with business- friendly processes and costs. It is essential that all stakeholders continue to work together to support these positive trends and further enhance the attractiveness of the system. The Unitary Patent system provides the foundation for the free flow of technology in Europe, offering the legal certainty that research, investment, and scale depend on. The fragmentation of the European patent landscape sets a further bureaucratic hurdle for less-experienced users, especially for European SMEs and research institutions. It is therefore vital that all EU Member States join the Unitary Patent system so that its full potential can be realised, as emphasised in the Draghi and Letta reports and the EU's Single Market Strategy. 4 1. items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月，EPO 与德国 GRUR 在慕尼黑会晤，聚焦专利质量行动计划、单一专利制度进展及未来技术展望。双方肯定 UP/UPC 对欧盟单一市场的价值，并就 EPO 观察站关于 2025-2045 年专利体系情景规划展开合作探讨，旨在提升法律确定性与技术创新主权。

items.title: Oath taking of newly appointed legally qualified judges
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院五名新任法律资格法官宣誓就职
items.summary: Oath taking of 5 newly appointed legally qualified judges will take place at the Local division Munich (DE), Local division The Hague (NL), the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Local division Düsseldorf (DE) and Central division Munich (DE)
items.content: Oath taking of 5 newly appointed legally qualified judges will take place at the Local division Munich (DE), Local division The Hague (NL), the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Local division Düsseldorf (DE) and Central division Munich (DE) Following the news from 22 December 2025 and in accordance of the decision of the Administrative Committee dated 4 November 2025 (AC/05/04112025), Ms Ina Schnurr has been appointed as legally qualified judge at the Local division Munich, Mr Robert van Peursem at the Local division The Hague, Ms Goda Ambrasaité-Balyniené at the Nordic-Baltic Regional division, Mr Ingo Rinken at the Local division Düsseldorf and Mr Thomas Adocker at the Central division Munich. Before taking up their duties, they shall take an oath in open court, in accordance with Article 6 of the Statute of the UPC. For this purpose, open court sessions will take place as follows: Local division Munich (DE): oath taking of Ms Ina Schnurr Local division The Hague (NL): oath taking of Mr Robert van Peursem Nordic-Baltic Regional division: oath taking of Ms Goda Ambrasaité-Balyniené Local division Düsseldorf (DE): oath taking of Mr Ingo Rinken Central division Munich (DE): oath taking of Mr Thomas Adocker
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）宣布五名新任法律资格法官正式任命。依据行政委员会决定，这些法官将分别在慕尼黑、海牙、北欧 - 波罗的海地区及杜塞尔多夫分院履职。在正式上任前，他们将根据《UPC 规约》第六条规定，在各自分院的公开法庭上进行宣誓，标志着 UPC 司法力量的进一步充实。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["五名新法官获任并将在德国、荷兰及北欧分院履职", "依据行政委员会决定及《UPC 规约》完成法定任命程序", "新任法官须在公开法庭宣誓后方可正式行使审判职责"]
items.ai_insight_zh: UPC 法官团队扩充意味着案件审理能力增强，可能加快诉讼进程。中国企业应关注各分院人员变动对裁判风格潜在影响，提前评估在德、荷等地专利布局风险，优化应对策略。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法官增补或提升结案效率，需警惕诉讼节奏加快风险", "不同分院新任背景差异，可能影响特定技术领域裁判倾向"]

items.title: Presidium announces establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division
items.title_zh: UPC 主席团宣布杜塞尔多夫地方分院设立第二审判庭
items.summary: The Presidium of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has decided the establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division (DE) as of 1 March 2026
items.content: The Presidium of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has decided the establishment of a second panel at Düsseldorf Local Division (DE) as of 1 March 2026 Following the decision of Presidium of the UPC taken on 20 January 2026 (PR/20012026) a new panel will be set up at Local Division Düsseldorf as of 1 March 2026. Ms Bérénice Thom , legally qualified judge, has been appointed as Presiding judge of Panel 2. She will be joined on the panel by Mr Ingo Rinken , legally qualified judge. Panel 1 of the LD Düsseldorf is presided by Mr Ronny Thomas , legally qualified judge. He is joined on the panel by Ms Jule Schumacher , legally qualified judge. 附件文档： - 20 January 2026 | https://www.unifiedpatentcourt.org/sites/default/files/upc_documents/decision%20on%20presiding%20judges%20of%20panels%20DUSSEL%20MUNC%20v2.pdf 附件摘录：20 January 2026 PR/20012026 Presidium of the Unified Patent Court Designation of the Presiding Judges of Panels Local Division Düsseldorf Local Division Munich Date: 20 January 2026 Place: Luxemburg PR/20012026 DECISION OF THE PRESIDIUM OF 20 JANUARY 2026 THE PRESIDIUM OF THE UNIFIED PATENT COURT HAVING REGARD to the Agreement on a Unified Patent Court (UPCA) and in particular Article 8 thereof. HAVING REGARD to the Rules of Procedure of the Unified Patent Court and in particular R.341.4 thereof. HAS ADOPTED THE FOLLOWING DECISION: Article 1 The Presiding judges of the Panels of the Local Division Düsseldorf are designated as follows: Panel 1: Mr. Ronny Thomas Panel 2: Ms. Berenice Thom The Presiding judges of the Panels of the Local Division Munich are designated as follows: Panel 1: Mr. Matthias Zigann Panel 2: Mr. Daniel Voss Article 2 The present decision will enter into force as of 1 March 2026. Done at Luxembourg on 20 January 2026 For the Presidium signed Klaus Grabinski The Chairman
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）主席团决定自 2026 年 3 月 1 日起，在杜塞尔多夫地方分院设立第二个审判庭。该决定基于 2026 年 1 月 20 日的决议，旨在应对案件增长。Bérénice Thom 法官被任命为第二审判庭审判长，与 Ingo Rinken 法官共同履职；原第一审判庭由 Ronny Thomas 法官继续领导。此举标志着 UPC 在德国关键司法辖区的审理能力显著增强。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院将于 2026 年 3 月正式增设第二审判庭", "Bérénice Thom 获任第二审判庭审判长，强化法官资源配置", "此举措反映 UPC 案件量上升及德国作为专利诉讼中心的重要性"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 杜塞尔多夫是欧洲专利诉讼重镇，增设审判庭意味着案件处理效率提升但诉讼风险亦增。在欧中国企业需重新评估当地诉讼策略，加强专利稳定性分析，并密切关注新审判庭的判例倾向，以防范潜在侵权纠纷。

Alongside this relaunch, we are introducing an updated format designed to offer clearer insights and a more user‑friendly presentation. items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）宣布恢复月度统计数据发布，并启用新格式以提供更清晰的洞察。截至 2026 年 2 月 28 日，一审法院共受理案件 1130 起，其中 2026 年前两个月新增 72 起。数据显示德国杜塞尔多夫和慕尼黑分院案件量领先，英语为最主要诉讼语言。新数据涵盖侵权、无效及临时措施等细分类型，全面展示法院活动趋势。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 恢复并发布更新格式的月度诉讼统计数据", "年前两月新增 72 起案件，德语区分院最活跃", "英语占比超六成成为主要诉讼语言，数据维度更丰富"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需密切关注 UPC 诉讼高地（如杜塞尔多夫）的动态，提前布局应对策略。鉴于英语案件占比高，建议提升涉外诉讼语言能力，并利用公开数据分析竞争对手在欧专利布局与诉讼倾向，优化风险防控。

items.title: EPO meets with Novartis
items.title_zh: EPO 与诺华举行会议探讨专利审查时效与统一专利体系
items.summary: On 4 February, the European Patent Office (EPO) held an online meeting with the Swiss pharmaceutical and biotechnology company Novartis.
items.content: On 4 February, the European Patent Office (EPO) held an online meeting with the Swiss pharmaceutical and biotechnology company Novartis. The exchanges, which form part of the EPO’s structured engagement with large applicants, marked the fourth bilateral meeting of this kind in 2026 and the 110 th since the EPO first launched its initiative to deepen user dialogue in 2021. The Novartis delegation was led by Head of Commercial IP Marco Riensche and included more than 20 representatives based at the company’s headquarters in Basel, as well as in the United States and the United Kingdom. The EPO delegation was led by Vice-President Patent Granting Process Steve Rowan, supported by managers and experts working in the fields of pharmaceuticals, biotechnology and patent law. Filing trends and investment considerations Novartis representatives emphasised timeliness of patent examination as being critical for companies’ investment decisions, especially with regard to new formulations and dosage regimens, as well as further medical uses. As Mr. Riensche emphasised, " a timely decision on whether a patent will be granted or upheld is crucial for planning and investment decisions" . Unitary Patent and supplementary protection certificates Novartis maintains a cautious but positive approach to the Unitary Patent, and representatives expressed strong support for a centralised supplementary protection certificate system with invalidity requests and appeals handled in the Unified Patent Court. They highlighted the benefits of EU-wide consistency, as well as streamlined procedures and agreed that the EPO is a suitable authority to implement such a system. Feedback on the latest Guidelines Recent revisions to the Guidelines for Examination regarding antibody-related patent applications were also discussed. The EPO highlighted the public online consultation that commences in the first quarter of every year, offering all users the opportunity to submit feedback on the preview versions of each set of Guidelines, ahead of their entry into force on 1 April. Dialogue continues Mr Riensche thanked the EPO for the constructive meeting and welcomed continued dialogue, noting that “ there is still much more to discuss .” About Novartis Novartis is a global pharmaceutical company with a strong research focus. In the Patent Index for 2024, Novartis ranked 13 th among Swiss applicants at the EPO, with 120 filings. In 2025, Novartis invested more than USD 10 billion in research and development and employed more than 20 000 R&D staff worldwide, with a significant footprint in Europe (more than 9 000 R&D staff). The company has the third-largest drug pipeline among pharmaceutical companies globally and maintains an in-house IP team of around 80 patent attorneys worldwide. Further information
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 2 月 4 日，欧洲专利局（EPO）与瑞士诺华公司举行线上会议，重点讨论专利审查时效对投资决策的关键影响。双方就统一专利制度及建立集中化补充保护证书（SPC）体系交换意见，诺华支持由 EPO 实施该体系并交由统一专利法院处理无效诉讼。此外，会议还涉及抗体相关专利申请审查指南的修订反馈机制。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺华强调专利审查时效性直接决定新药研发投资决策", "支持建立集中化 SPC 体系，主张由统一专利法院管辖无效上诉", "双方就抗体专利审查指南修订及公众咨询机制进行深入交流"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企应关注欧洲专利审查提速趋势，优化布局策略。同时需重视统一专利法院在 SPC 纠纷中的核心地位，提前构建应对集中化无效挑战的预案，利用指南修订窗口期提升申请质量。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借势审查提速机制，加速高价值医药专利在欧洲的授权落地", "针对集中化 SPC 体系，预演统一专利法院的无效抗辩与诉讼策略"]

items.title: Upcoming changes to judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院及巴黎一审分部法官组成变更公告
items.summary: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026
items.content: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026 Following the retirement of Ms Emanuela Germano, legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal, at the end of March 2026, the Administrative Committee, by decision D-AC/03/02072025 of 2 July 2025, nominated Mr Paolo Catallozzi, legally qualified judge at the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, to be appointed as legally qualified judge of the Court of Appeal as of 1 April 2026. Following the promotion of Mr Paolo Catallozzi to the Court of Appeal, the Administrative Committee also decided on 2 July 2025 (D-AC/04/02072025) to appoint Mr Vincenzo Carn ì as legally qualified judge as of 1 April 2026. The President of the Court of Appeal, Mr Klaus Grabinski and the President of the Court of First Instance, Ms Florence Butin, thank Ms Germano for her valuable work for the Court of Appeal and wish her an enjoyable retirement. The Presidents wish Mr Catallozzi a successful start in his new position at the Court of Appeal and Mr Carnì a warm welcome to the Court of First Instance.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起调整司法人员组成。因上诉院法官 Germano 退休，原巴黎中央分部一审法官 Catallozzi 晋升至上诉院；同时任命 Carnì为新任巴黎一审法官。该决定由行政委员会于 2025 年 7 月作出，旨在确保法院审判工作的连续性与稳定性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院法官 Germano 将于 2026 年 3 月底正式退休离任", "Catallozzi 从巴黎一审分部晋升至上诉院，2026 年 4 月生效", "行政委员会任命 Carnì填补巴黎一审分部法官空缺"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 法官更替可能影响特定技术领域的审判风格与倾向性。在欧中企需关注新任法官背景，评估对未决案件或未来诉讼策略的潜在影响，适时调整法律团队配置以应对巴黎分部的司法实践变化。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注新任法官专业背景，预判其对专利有效性及侵权判定的倾向", "针对巴黎分部案件，建议重新评估诉讼策略与证据准备重点"]

items.title: Local division Mannheim flirts with setting FRAND rate
items.title_zh: UPC 曼海姆分部倾向裁定 FRAND 许可费率
items.summary: Following Munich Regional Court, Mannheim local division is now also opening up to making a FRAND-rate determination.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles ARNOLD RUESS WALLINGER RICKER SCHLOTTER TOSTMANN GLAWE · DELFS · MOLL View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Yannick Schütt, LL.M. Sebastian Kratzer Yelena Morozova View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

WALLINGER RICKER SCHLOTTER TOSTMANN

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

German courts have always had a reputation for avoiding FRAND-rate determinations. Until now. Following Munich Regional Court, Mannheim local division is now also opening up to this. In yesterday's hearing in ZTE vs Samsung, presiding judge Peter Tochtermann presented the framework for a UPC FRAND-rate determination proceeding.

During yesterday’s hearing, the Mannheim local division under presiding judge Peter Tochtermann took the opportunity to provide an astonishing amount of basic information that did not necessarily relate to the case being heard that day. The local division heard the first of three infringement claims at the UPC between ZTE and Samsung.

The relatively small courtroom at Schubertstraße 11 in Mannheim was filled to capacity with lawyers, patent attorneys, in-house representatives and economic experts from ZTE and Samsung. Additional employees from both companies were also present from South Korea and China. Other observers watched from the overflow room. JUVE Patent was also present.

Tochtermann encouraged those present to file lawsuits at non-German UPC divisions, such as the Paris local division. Carine Gillet from Paris is the third judge on the panel in Mannheim alongside Tochtermann. Tochtermann also had some de-escalating words about the current tense relationship with the UK High Court. Above all, however, in the panel’s preliminary opinion he addressed the topic of FRAND-rate setting — considered to be the domain of the UK High Court.

There is a specific reason for this. Samsung had filed a FRAND counterclaim in the proceedings at the end of 2025, which the local division must now decide on.
items.ai_summary_zh: 继慕尼黑地方法院后，统一专利法院（UPC）曼海姆地方分院在 ZTE 诉三星案中展现新动向。主审法官托赫特曼明确提出 FRAND 费率裁定框架，回应三星提出的反诉。此举打破德国法院长期避免裁定全球费率的惯例，显示 UPC 正积极介入标准必要专利定价核心领域，可能重塑欧洲乃至全球专利许可诉讼策略。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["曼海姆分院打破德国法院不裁定 FRAND 费率的传统惯例", "法官在审理中主动提出 UPC 框架下的费率裁定程序指引", "针对三星反诉，法院明确将行使费率裁定管辖权"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更直接的费率裁决风险与机遇。建议重新评估 UPC 诉讼策略，利用其高效机制争取有利费率；同时需警惕被动应诉时的全球费率绑定风险，提前储备经济证据以应对精细化审理。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 UPC 新机制主动发起或应对费率诉讼，争取全球定价权", "强化经济专家证言准备，以应对法院对费率计算的深度审查"]

items.title: Local division Mannheim holds single day hearing for ZTE vs Samsung
items.title_zh: UPC 曼海姆分部单日审理中兴诉三星侵权及 FRAND 抗辩
items.summary: The local division Mannheim will hear ZTE's infringement claim and Samsung's FRAND defence in the dispute over 4G and 5G.
items.content:
Firms & Experts Sponsored: Firm Profiles BARDEHLE PAGENBERG Taylor Wessing PENTARC Rechtsanwälte PartG mbB View all Firm Profiles Sponsored: Expert Profiles Daniel Wise Dr. rer. nat., Dipl.-Phys., Dipl.-Kfm. Georg Anetsberger Tom Foster View all Expert Profiles Sponsored Content UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP View all Sponsored Content

Dr. rer. nat., Dipl.-Phys., Dipl.-Kfm. Georg Anetsberger

UPC Provisional Measures: Dual Validi… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

Lessons from dapagliflozin in the UK:… by Pinsent Masons LLP

The Unified Patent Court and Damages:… by Simmons + Simmons LLP

The local division Mannheim had originally scheduled the hearing for three days. It has since been reduced to one. With no settlement in sight, the local division will hear ZTE's infringement claim and Samsung's FRAND defence in the dispute over global 4G and 5G licences over the next few hours.

The global SEP dispute with ZTE has not gone well for Samsung so far. The South Korean mobile phone giant has not managed to prevail with an application for an interim licence in the UK. Furthermore, Frankfurt Regional Court recently dismissed an antitrust action against ZTE. And now, according to JUVE Patent sources, Samsung has likely received an unfavourable preliminary opinion from the European Patent Office’s Opposition Division regarding the validity of EP 4 096 288 .

The patent was the basis for one of Samsung’s lawsuits at the UPC in the global dispute with ZTE over a global licence for 4G and 5G. The local division Mannheim under presiding judge Peter Tochtermann has now provisionally suspended the proceedings until the validity of EP 288 has been clarified (case ID: UPC_CFI_188/2025 ).

The local division had planned a double hearing for today and tomorrow. The programme initially included one infringement claim from ZTE and one from Samsung. Following the latest developments, the Mannheim local division will now only hear ZTE’s infringement action regarding EP 3 905 730 (case ID: UPC_CFI_850/2024 ).

The patent protects a system information transmission method and device. In addition to the infringement of EP 730, the question of whether both parties have behaved in a FRAND-compliant manner with their offers is also on today’s agenda. This is common practice in major SEP battles. In addition, Samsung filed a FRAND counterclaim in late 2025, which is also on today’s agenda.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院曼海姆地方分院将单日审理中兴对三星的 4G/5G 专利侵权主张及三星的 FRAND 抗辩。因三星涉案专利在 EPO 异议部获不利初步意见，法院已中止相关程序。此前三星在英国申请临时许可失败且在德国反垄断诉讼受挫，此次听证聚焦中兴专利有效性及双方 FRAND 合规性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["曼海姆分院缩减庭审为一天，专注中兴侵权案与三星 FRAND 抗辩", "三星涉案专利遭 EPO 不利初步意见，导致部分诉讼程序被暂时中止", "三星在全球 SEP 纠纷中接连受挫，包括英国许可申请被拒及德国反垄断败诉"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对 SEP 诉讼需高度重视 EPO 异议程序对 UPC 侵权诉讼的阻断效应。建议提前布局专利稳定性分析，并在 FRAND 谈判中保留完整证据链，以应对欧盟法院日益严格的合规审查。

While Amgen markets Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab, Sanofi markets Praluent with the active ingredient alirocumab. Both are […] The post Amgen vs Sanofi – A chronology of the patent battle over Repatha and Praluent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: JUVE Patent followed the dispute between Amgen on the one side and Sanofi and Regeneron on the other over cholesterol-lowering drugs for many years. At the heart of the case are the two drugs Repatha and Praluent. While Amgen markets Repatha with the active ingredient evolocumab, Sanofi markets Praluent with the active ingredient alirocumab. Both are […] The post Amgen vs Sanofi – A chronology of the patent battle over Repatha and Praluent appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文梳理了安进与赛诺菲、再生元之间关于降胆固醇药物 Repatha 和 Praluent 的长期专利纠纷。案件核心涉及两种 PCSK9 抑制剂活性成分的专利有效性及侵权认定。该争端横跨多国司法辖区，并已成为检验欧洲统一专利法院（UPC）处理复杂生物医药专利能力的标志性案例，对行业竞争格局影响深远。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["安进与赛诺菲就两款降脂药展开多年跨国专利攻防", "案件焦点在于 evolocumab 与 alirocumab 成分专利效力", "该诉讼是观察 UPC 审理高价值医药专利案的关键窗口"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企出海需警惕类似 PCSK9 靶点专利雷区，提前开展 FTO 分析。建议密切关注 UPC 判例走向，利用其统一裁决机制降低多国应诉成本，制定灵活的欧洲专利布局与许可策略。

items.title: After ownership change: Silimed and Polytech poised to fight it out at UPC
items.title_zh: 权属变更后：Silimed 与 Polytech 拟在 UPC 展开对决
items.summary: Just over a year ago, the Frankfurt Higher Regional Court granted Silimed the property rights to EP 2 581 193. The patent protects a process for manufacturing implants. Since 2017 the Brazilian manufacturer had fought with competitor Polytech over the ownership of the technology. After the rights were officially transferred, Silimed recently launched an infringement […] The post After ownership change: Silimed and Polytech poised to fight it out at UPC appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Just over a year ago, the Frankfurt Higher Regional Court granted Silimed the property rights to EP 2 581 193. The patent protects a process for manufacturing implants. Since 2017 the Brazilian manufacturer had fought with competitor Polytech over the ownership of the technology. After the rights were officially transferred, Silimed recently launched an infringement […] The post After ownership change: Silimed and Polytech poised to fight it out at UPC appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 法兰克福高等地方法院一年前裁定巴西 Silimed 公司拥有 EP2581193 号植入物制造专利权属，终结了其与竞争对手 Polytech 自 2017 年的纠纷。权属正式转移后，Silimed 随即在统一专利法院（UPC）提起侵权诉讼。此案标志着双方战场从德国国内法院转向泛欧司法体系，凸显 UPC 在处理跨国专利争端中的新角色。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国法院裁定 Silimed 获得涉案欧洲专利完整所有权", "权属确立后，Silimed 立即在统一专利法院发起侵权诉讼", "案件体现欧洲专利争端解决机制向 UPC 集中化的趋势"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇专利权属或侵权纠纷时，需高度关注 UPC 的新管辖权。建议提前评估欧洲专利组合风险，熟悉 UPC 程序规则，避免因属地诉讼策略滞后而陷入被动，必要时利用统一法院机制维权。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视 UPC 管辖权，调整欧洲专利诉讼与应对策略", "强化权属尽职调查，防范跨国专利纠纷连锁反应"]

items.summary: Netflix has been battling Broadcom, previously known as Avago, over multiple video coding patents since 2018. The patent owned by Avago covers a “set top box architecture with application based […] The post No luck for Broadcom as Netflix and Quinn Emanuel succeed in another nullity claim appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Netflix has been battling Broadcom, previously known as Avago, over multiple video coding patents since 2018. In total, the extensive campaign comprises eight patents, of which seven have now finally been revoked. The current case centres on EP 2 723 094. The patent owned by Avago covers a “set top box architecture with application based […] The post No luck for Broadcom as Netflix and Quinn Emanuel succeed in another nullity claim appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 自 2018 年起，Netflix 与博通（原 Avago）就多项视频编码专利展开激烈诉讼。此次案件聚焦欧洲专利 EP 2 723 094，涉及机顶盒架构技术。继此前七项专利被撤销后，本次诉讼中 Netflix 再次胜诉，该专利亦被宣告无效。这标志着博通在该系列专利战中遭遇重大挫折，凸显了统一专利法院在专利无效裁决中的关键作用。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Netflix 累计使博通八项视频编码专利中七项被撤销", "本案核心为 EP 2 723 094 号欧洲专利的无效宣告请求", "博通在长期专利诉讼中持续失利，专利稳定性受挑战"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局视频编码等标准必要专利时，需警惕高频率无效挑战。建议提前进行严格的专利稳定性评估，并关注 UPC 判例趋势，制定灵活的诉讼与许可策略，避免重蹈博通覆辙。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化专利事前稳定性筛查，规避无效风险", "密切关注 UPC 裁判动态，优化海外维权策略"]

items.title: “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed”
items.title_zh: 呼吁亟需召开威尼斯法官临时会议
items.summary: Once a year in October, European patent judges meet in Venice for the European Judges’ Forum. The idea behind the so-called Venice conference is for judges to engage in a friendly exchange of ideas behind closed doors. Lawyers and other patent experts are only admitted in exceptional cases. Unlike other conferences, where publicity is high […] The post “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed” appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Once a year in October, European patent judges meet in Venice for the European Judges’ Forum. The idea behind the so-called Venice conference is for judges to engage in a friendly exchange of ideas behind closed doors. Lawyers and other patent experts are only admitted in exceptional cases. Unlike other conferences, where publicity is high […] The post “An interim Venice judges’ conference is desperately needed” appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出每年十月举行的威尼斯欧洲法官论坛是专利法官闭门交流思想的重要平台，律师通常被排除在外。鉴于当前欧洲专利诉讼环境变化，评论强调亟需召开一次临时会议，以确保法官间能继续就关键程序与裁判标准进行非公开的深度沟通，维护司法一致性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["威尼斯会议是欧洲专利法官闭门交流的核心年度机制", "文章呼吁打破常规，亟需增加一次临时法官会议", "旨在通过非公开对话解决当前专利诉讼中的分歧"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注欧洲专利法官内部协调动态，这可能预示 UPC 裁判标准的微调。建议密切跟踪会议后续成果，评估对在建案件的影响，并提前调整诉讼策略以应对潜在的司法倾向变化。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法官闭门会议可能引发 UPC 裁判标准的隐性调整", "在欧中企需动态监控司法风向并优化诉讼布局"]

items.ai_summary_zh: InterDigital 在德国、美国、巴西及统一专利法院（UPC）起诉亚马逊，指控其 FireTV 和 Kindle 等设备及服务侵犯十项涉及视频压缩与 HDR 技术的专利。本案凸显跨国专利巨头利用欧洲新司法架构进行全球维权策略的升级，是观察 UPC 实务的重要案例。

items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）驳回了 ParTec 针对英伟达提起的三项诉讼之一。ParTec 由前 IPCom 创始人支持，指控英伟达 GPU 产品组合侵犯其 EP3743812 号专利并寻求禁令。此次败诉可能导致双方争端进一步升级，凸显 UPC 在芯片领域专利执法中的关键角色及诉讼风险。

items.summary: Since the launch of the UPC, Huawei has increasingly changed its role from defendant to claimant in major patent disputes. With several new lawsuits against Disney over HEVC technology, the Chinese tech group once again shows its determination to defend its own patents in Europe. Huawei filed a lawsuit against twelve companies of the Walt […] The post Huawei launches another major battle over streaming against Disney appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.content: Since the launch of the UPC, Huawei has increasingly changed its role from defendant to claimant in major patent disputes. With several new lawsuits against Disney over HEVC technology, the Chinese tech group once again shows its determination to defend its own patents in Europe. Huawei filed a lawsuit against twelve companies of the Walt […] The post Huawei launches another major battle over streaming against Disney appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 自统一专利法院（UPC）成立以来，华为角色从被告转向原告。近期，华为就 HEVC 技术向迪士尼旗下十二家公司提起多项新诉讼。此举彰显中国科技巨头利用 UPC 机制在欧洲积极维权、捍卫自身专利组合的战略决心，标志着其在欧知识产权策略的重大转变。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华为利用 UPC 机制转变角色，从被动应诉转为主动发起专利诉讼", "案件聚焦 HEVC 流媒体技术，被告涵盖迪士尼旗下十二家关联公司", "此案体现中国企业依托欧洲统一司法体系强化海外专利保护的意图"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应善用 UPC 统一管辖优势，变被动为主动。建议提前布局高价值专利，建立常态化监控与诉讼应对机制，将知识产权转化为欧洲市场的核心竞争壁垒与谈判筹码。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用 UPC 统一裁判机制，降低多国诉讼成本，提升维权效率", "从防御转向进攻，通过主动诉讼确立行业地位并获取许可收益"]

items.title: Dolby wins four-country Opus injunction as UPC hands down third FRAND ruling
items.title_zh: 杜比获四国禁令，UPC 作出第三项 FRAND 裁决
items.summary: Beko/Arçelik failed to comply with Huawei-ZTE steps, local division finds
items.content: Beko/Arçelik failed to comply with Huawei-ZTE steps, local division finds
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）地方分院作出第三项涉及标准必要专利的 FRAND 裁决。法院认定被告 Beko/Arçelik 未遵守华为 - 中兴案确立的谈判步骤，因此支持权利人杜比在四个国家获得的禁令救济。此案进一步明确了 UPC 在处理 SEP 纠纷及适用 FRAND 原则时的司法立场。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 作出第三项 FRAND 裁决，确立新的司法先例", "被告因未遵循华为 - 中兴谈判步骤而败诉", "杜比成功获得跨越四个国家的专利禁令救济"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧运营需严格遵循华为 - 中兴谈判流程，避免因程序瑕疵遭遇多国禁令。建议提前评估 SEP 风险，建立合规谈判机制，并积极利用 UPC 统一诉讼规则应对跨境纠纷。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严守谈判程序是规避欧盟多国禁令的关键防线", "需重视 UPC 统一裁判趋势，调整跨境维权策略"]

items.title: European SEP developments spur calls to add UK, Germany and UPC to US patent watch list
items.title_zh: 欧洲 SEP 动态引发将英德及 UPC 列入美国专利观察名单呼声
items.summary: As standard essential patent policy debates escalate, some stakeholders advocate for adding European jurisdictions on the USTR watch list
items.content: As standard essential patent policy debates escalate, some stakeholders advocate for adding European jurisdictions on the USTR watch list
items.ai_summary_zh: 随着标准必要专利（SEP）政策辩论升级，部分利益相关方呼吁美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）将英国、德国及统一专利法院（UPC）列入特别 301 报告观察名单。此举旨在施压欧洲司法辖区调整 FRAND 许可规则，反映跨大西洋在 SEP 执法与定价机制上的深层分歧，可能重塑全球专利许可格局。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["利益方呼吁 USTR 将英、德及 UPC 纳入专利观察名单", "争议焦点在于欧洲 SEP 禁令救济与 FRAND 费率裁定机制", "此举标志欧美在标准必要专利政策协调上出现显著裂痕"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临更复杂的地缘政治化专利环境。需警惕美欧规则冲突导致的合规风险，建议提前评估英德诉讼策略，建立多元化 FRAND 抗辩预案，避免成为大国博弈牺牲品。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注美欧政策分歧对在英德诉讼策略的潜在冲击", "构建应对地缘政治化专利纠纷的多元化合规预案"]

brief.headline_zh: UPC 长臂管辖与 FRAND 费率博弈升级
brief.headline_en: UPC Long-Arm Jurisdiction and FRAND Rate Wars Escalate
brief.summary_zh: 欧洲 SEP 诉讼进入深水区，UPC 上诉院通过戴森案首次向欧盟法院提请长臂管辖裁决，界定非欧盟被告责任边界。同时，德国与 UPC 曼海姆分院积极介入全球 FRAND 费率裁定，打破传统惯例。许可意愿认定标准趋严，单纯担保已不足以免除禁令风险，数据合规与谈判留痕成为生存关键。
key_points: UPC 上诉院就非欧盟实体长臂管辖权首次提请 CJEU 裁决，明确境内损害与行政代表责任界限。
德国慕尼黑法院及 UPC 曼海姆分院打破不裁定费率传统，主动确立全球 FRAND 许可条件。
司法实践重构‘许可意愿’标准，强调双向合规评估，单一银行担保不再构成绝对抗辩理由。
actions: 立即审查欧盟授权代表协议，隔离产品安全义务与知识产权侵权责任，防范连带被诉。
建立全周期谈判留痕机制，准备高质量可比协议数据，以应对法院对费率的双向严格审查。
利用 EPO 异议程序作为战术工具，在 UPC 或德国诉讼中申请中止审理，争取谈判筹码。
watchlist: 欧盟法院关于 UPC 长臂管辖权的初步裁决结果及其对非欧盟制造企业的最终界定。
德国联邦最高法院在 VoiceAge 诉 HMD 案中对‘非自愿被许可人’认定的终审风向。
Avanci 等专利池向 Wi-Fi 7 及物联网领域扩张引发的新一轮集体许可与反垄断调查。

sep_ai_analysis.summary_zh: SEP 长窗从 2025.01 累计到现在，共识别 120 条高相关信号。近120天里，许可动作占比最高，欧洲层面仍是最活跃场域。
sep_ai_analysis.summary_en: The SEP long window now spans from Jan 2025 to the present with 120 high-relevance signals. In the recent 120-day window, Licensing lead the mix and Europe-wide remains the busiest forum.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 近120天 许可动作 29 / 前120天 8 / 长窗累计 79

insight_cards.insight_zh: 欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的场域，德国紧随其后，争议正在形成多法域联动。
insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with Germany close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。
insight_cards.action_en: Track procedural and decisional shifts in Europe-wide first, then watch for spillover into other venues.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 欧洲层面 30 条；德国 7 条

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 16 条，占近期样本 32%。重点企业包括 Oppo / ZTE / Huawei。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 16 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 32% of the sample. Focus companies include Oppo / ZTE / Huawei.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 100% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。
insight_cards.insight_en: About 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis; summary-only items are mainly useful for directional trend support.
insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。
insight_cards.action_en: For business-critical signals, step back to the source text or public preview before escalating them into priority warnings.
insight_cards.evidence_zh: 全文 37 / 预览 83 / 摘要 0

trend_judgments: 近120天 SEP标准必要专利信号较前120天增加 41 条，整体仍在升温。
当前最强主线仍是许可动作，近120天共 29 条，说明专利池、费率与双边谈判继续主导节奏。
欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的主导法域/场域，共出现 30 条相关信号。
中企相关信号近120天共有 16 条，占近期样本 32%；当前专题中约 100% 的样本基于全文或公开预览分析。
trend_judgments_en: SEP signals are up by 41 over the prior 120 days, pointing to a still-heating window.
Licensing remains the strongest line with 29 recent signals, keeping pools, rates, and bilateral talks at the center.
Europe-wide is the most active forum in the recent 120-day window with 30 signals.
China-related signals account for 16 items, or 32% of the recent window; about 100% of the topic rests on full-text or public-preview analysis.

brief.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

china_company_map.conclusion_zh: Oppo 当前以诉讼风险为主，且近期明显升温，建议优先前置许可准备与争议预案。

items.title: Advocate General's Opinion in Case C-876/24 Vueling Airlines (Court having jurisdiction in the event of an online contract for national carriage by air)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：在线购票地非乘客住所决定航空管辖权
items.summary: Jurisdiction: according to Advocate General Spielmann, in the case of the online purchase of an airline ticket, the passenger's place of residence cannot determine the courts having jurisdiction for the place where the carrier has a place of business through which the air transport contract has been made
items.content: Jurisdiction: according to Advocate General Spielmann, in the case of the online purchase of an airline ticket, the passenger's place of residence cannot determine the courts having jurisdiction for the place where the carrier has a place of business through which the air transport contract has been made PRESS RELEASE No 25/26 Luxembourg, 26 February 2026 Advocate General's Opinion in Case C-876/24 | Vueling Airlines (Court having jurisdiction in the event of an online contract for national carriage by air) Jurisdiction: according to Advocate General Spielmann, in the case of the online purchase of an airline ticket, the passenger's place of residence cannot determine the courts having jurisdiction for the place where the carrier has a place of business through which the air transport contract has been made In view of the changes in the aviation sector, it is proposed that that court – before which the passenger may bring an action for damages against an air carrier – is that of the place where is located the airport at which that carrier, directly or through another carrier, checks in passengers and their baggage A passenger purchased a ticket for a flight from Madrid (Spain) to Barcelona (Spain) from the airline Vueling Airlines (Barcelona). The ticket was purchased from the passenger's home in Fuenlabrada (Madrid) through an independent online sales platform. At Madrid airport, the passenger added the check-in of baggage as an additional service to the flight. The baggage was lost. The passenger filed a claim with a court in Fuenlabrada for compensation for the damage resulting from the loss of her baggage. The Spanish court expressed several doubts concerning the interpretation of the Montreal Convention, 1 which comprises, inter alia, rules on jurisdiction in cases of actions for damages against a carrier in the context of international carriage by air. 2 It therefore decided to refer the matter to the Court of Justice. The Spanish court first asks whether it has jurisdiction to hear the case, as the loss of baggage occurred during air transport between two airports located in the same Member State. In his Opinion delivered today, Advocate General Spielmann considers that it follows from EU law that the rules of the Montreal Convention are applicable to air transport within a Member State of the European Union. The Convention pursues an objective of uniformity which is reflected in European policy in that sector, aimed at harmonising certain areas of carrier liability and passenger rights. Next, the Spanish court wishes to know whether it has jurisdiction as the court of the place where the carrier has a place of business through which the air transport contract has been made. 3 That would require interpreting that place as including the principal and permanent residence of the passenger where the contract has been entered into online. The Advocate General rejects that possibility. 4 Last, the Spanish court asks whether, in order to determine that place, a distinction must be made between the principal obligation of carriage by air and the ancillary service of carriage of baggage, in particular where the damage caused relates specifically to the latter. According to the Advocate General, an ancillary service or contract cannot be considered to be decisive in identifying where the carrier has a place of business through which the contract has been made. 5 That criterion therefore refers to the place where the contract relating to the principal obligation of carriage by air was entered into. Communications Directorate Press and Information Unit curia.europa.eu Mr Spielmann considers that a broader examination of the possible interpretation of that place, in particular when the contract of carriage is concluded online, is useful. The Advocate General considers that that interpretation must be broad and flexible, and must take into account both the enhanced protection afforded to passengers by the Convention and the transformation of the sector as a result of technological advances. He therefore proposes to interpret that place as referring, in the case of a contract concluded online, to the airport where the air carrier, either directly or through a commercial agreement with another carrier, checks in passengers and their baggage. 6 NOTE: The Advocate General’s Opinion is not binding on the Court of Justice. It is the role of the Advocates General to propose to the Court, in complete independence, a legal solution to the cases for which they are responsible. The Judges of the Court are now beginning their deliberations in this case. Judgment will be given at a later date. NOTE: A reference for a preliminary ruling allows the courts and tribunals of the Member States, in disputes which have been brought before them, to refer questions to the Court of Justice about the interpretation of EU law or the validity of an EU act. The Court of Justice does not decide the dispute itself. It is for the national court or tribunal to dispose of the case in accordance with the Court’s decision, which is similarly binding on other national courts or tribunals before which a similar issue is raised. Unofficial document for media use, not binding on the Court of Justice. The full text of the Opinion is published on the CURIA website on the day of delivery. Press contact: Jacques René Zammit ✆ (+352) 4303 3355. Stay Connected! 1 Convention for the Unification of Certain Rules for International Carriage by Air, concluded at Montreal on 28 May 1999, signed on 9 December 1999 by the European Community, and approved on its behalf by Council Decision 2001/539/EC of 5 April 2001. 2 According to Article 33 of the Montreal Convention, an action for damages must be brought, at the option of the plaintiff, in the territory of one of the States Parties, either before the court of the domicile of the carrier or of its principal place of business, or where it has a place of business through which the contract has been made or before the court at the place of destination. The Convention lays down specific rules in the event of damage resulting from the death or injury of a passenger. 3 The Advocate General points out that this is the first time that the Court has been asked to interpret that criterion of jurisdiction…
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院总法律顾问就 Vueling 航空案发表意见，明确《蒙特利尔公约》适用于欧盟境内航空运输。意见指出，在线购票时乘客住所地不能作为确定承运人营业地法院管辖权的依据。建议将管辖法院定为承运人办理登机及行李托运手续的机场所在地法院，以统一裁判标准。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["蒙特利尔公约规则适用于欧盟成员国境内的航空运输案件", "乘客在线购票的住所地不构成承运人营业地法院的管辖依据", "管辖权应归属于承运人实际办理乘客及行李登机手续的机场地"]
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国航司及 OTA 平台在欧运营需关注管辖权新规，避免在乘客住所地被诉。建议在用户协议中明确争议解决地，并优化登机流程记录，以便在行李丢失等纠纷中快速锁定有利管辖法院，降低应诉成本。
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["在线销售不应默认接受乘客住所地法院的潜在管辖风险", "明确登机服务发生地是应对跨境行李索赔的关键抗辩点"]

items.title: UPC Weekly - UPC Court of Appeal imposes clear limit on long arm jurisdiction
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Adobe 案中明确限制长臂管辖权范围
items.summary: Lucy Coe explains the Court of Appeal decision in Adobe v. KeeeX overturning the first instance decision and limiting the UPC’s long arm jurisdiction.
items.content: Two weeks ago, we reported on the UPC Court of Appeal’s referral to the Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU), to provide guidance on whether the UPC has jurisdiction over a non-EU based defendant for alleged infringement of a European patent in a non-UPC EU country – see UPC Weekly 2026 w10 . In that case, there is a particular defendant domiciled in the UPC territory that is a service provider, required by EU product safety regulations, in order for the alleged infringement product to be sold in the EU. The CJEU is asked to consider whether that defendant can be an “anchor defendant”, giving the UPC jurisdiction over the non-EU based defendant’s sales in Spain. Now, the UPC Court of Appeal (CoA) has clarified in Adobe v. KeeeX that there is a clear limit to the long arm of the UPC, in particular when there is no defendant located within the territory of the UPC. KeeeX SAS brought an infringement action based on EP2949070 against a number of defendants including Adobe entities, OpenAI entities, and Truepic Inc. amongst others. All defendants were based in the US or Ireland. The US is of course not a UPC member state. Ireland is an EU member state, but is not a UPC member state because it has signed but not yet ratified the UPC Agreement. Therefore, none of the defendants were domiciled within the UPC territory. At first instance, the UPC Paris Local Division (LD) held that it had jurisdiction not only over infringement within UPC member states, but also for infringement outside of UPC territory, including in Switzerland, Spain, the UK, Ireland, Norway and Poland. This was based on the LD’s interpretation of the CJEU’s approach in BSH v. Electrolux . The CoA overturned the LD’s order insofar as it asserted jurisdiction for infringement outside of the UPC territory in Switzerland, Spain, the UK, Ireland, Norway and Poland. In the view of the CoA, the BSH case allows the jurisdiction of an EU court to be extended to “third country” territories outside of the EU, provided that a defendant is domiciled within the territory of the EU court. But for Adobe and the other defendants, none were domiciled within a UPC member state and so the UPC’s jurisdiction did not extend outside the UPC territory in this case. The CoA did however clarify that the UPC does have jurisdiction for defendants domiciled outside of the territory of the UPC (under Art. 7(2) Brussels Regulation ), but only for allegedly infringing acts within the UPC. In that case, jurisdiction is strictly limited to damage occurring within the UPC territory and cannot be extended to non-UPC countries. Additionally, in some specific circumstances, the UPC could have “ancillary” jurisdiction for defendants domiciled outside of the UPC territory, for infringement outside of the UPC territory. The specific circumstances require that the infringement also gives rise to damage within the EU, and (i) property belonging to the defendant is located in a UPC member state, and (ii) the dispute has sufficient connection with that UPC member state (Art. 71b(3) Brussels Regulation). In the present case, the CoA decided that KeeeX had not adequately explained if or how these requirements were met in their statement of claim. Claimants looking to sue defendants based outside of the UPC territory must do more than gesture at jurisdiction in their statement of claim. Where such a claimant wants the UPC to reach beyond the UPC territory, at the outset the claimant must set out both the legal basis relied upon and the facts and evidence said to justify it. Reliance on Art. 7(2) BR confines the case to infringement within the UPC territory only.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院推翻巴黎地方法院裁决，明确若被告均非 UPC 成员国居民，法院无权管辖非 UPC 领土内的侵权行为。该案澄清了布鲁塞尔条例适用边界：仅当损害发生在 UPC 境内时方可起诉境外被告，且不能延伸至瑞士、英国等非成员国的侵权损害，确立了清晰的管辖红线。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["无 UPC 境内被告时，法院无权管辖境外发生的专利侵权行为", "对境外被告的管辖严格限于 UPC 领土内产生的损害，不可外延", "推翻一审扩大解释，明确 BSH 判例不适用于无境内锚点被告情形"]
